rationale: Keep this pair because the cited paper appears directly relevant to the citing paper’s modeling domain: both are multi-brand FMCG studies focused on dynamic advertising/market-response modeling and sales outcomes. The citing note explicitly positions itself as extending prior advertising response research beyond spending/GRPs, and the cited work is a prominent integrative market-response model in that space, so this is not an obvious incidental mention (with an exact DOI match: 10.1509/jmkr.47.4.672).
